description: Make this app a Memory Infrastructure Registry (MIR) partner — its users become participants whose actions build portable, cross-partner reputation. Records participation events and resolves a participant's neutral signals (tier, history, claim status) via mirregistry.org. Onboarding (register → verify domain → promote) is driven from the config and only offered once SITE_URL is a public, DNS-resolving domain. Exposes app.locals.mir { submitEvent, resolveUser } to your routes and other add-ons.
